summary: Iteration 20: Priority Compression UX Layer - All 17 tests PASSED. Backend rank_domains function correctly scores and orders domains. Code verification confirms resolve_facts() at line 103 runs before AI call at line 174. BoardRoom.js has all required data-testid attributes for testing.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: rank_domains function correctly scores domains by position severity (CRITICAL=40, DETERIORATING=30, ELEVATED=15, STABLE=0)
VERIFIED: rank_domains adds pressure_level scoring (CRITICAL=+30, HIGH=+20, MODERATE=+10)
VERIFIED: rank_domains adds window_days compression scoring (<=3 days=+20, <=7 days=+10, <=14 days=+5)
VERIFIED: rank_domains adds contradiction scoring (+15 per contradiction)
VERIFIED: rank_domains adds persistence scoring from escalation_history (capped at +15)
VERIFIED: resolve_facts() at line 103 runs BEFORE AI call at line 174 in boardroom.py
VERIFIED: priority_compression field present in boardroom_respond return with primary/secondary/collapsed structure
VERIFIED: BoardRoom.js has data-testid='primary-focus-section' for Primary Focus
VERIFIED: BoardRoom.js has data-testid='secondary-section' for Secondary items
VERIFIED: BoardRoom.js has data-testid='collapsed-section' and 'show-collapsed-btn' for collapsed domains
VERIFIED: BoardRoom.js has evidence toggle pattern data-testid='evidence-toggle-{domain}'
VERIFIED: BoardRoom.js has data-testid='position-strip' for fallback when no compression data
VERIFIED: BoardRoom.js has data-testid='boardroom-input' and 'boardroom-submit' for input functionality
VERIFIED: Backend health check returns healthy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified all Priority Compression UX layer features. Key verifications: (1) rank_domains function scores domains correctly by severity, pressure, window_days, contradictions, and persistence, (2) resolve_facts() runs before AI call in boardroom_respond, (3) priority_compression field returned in response with primary/secondary/collapsed structure, (4) BoardRoom.js has all required data-testid attributes for UI testing, (5) Both boardroom endpoints require authentication. Note: Full E2E testing with authenticated user was NOT performed due to missing valid test credentials for andrewrx@hotmail.com. Main agent should provide valid credentials for E2E testing if needed.
